description: A ground-level photograph depicting an agricultural field under a partly cloudy sky, presented within a circular frame with a light blue border. The foreground consists of freshly tilled, dark brown soil with visible clods. In the mid-ground, a large, white, multi-span pivot irrigation system, supported by several wheeled towers, extends horizontally across the field. Behind the irrigation system, the landscape features lighter green areas, likely fields or distant hills, under the light blue and white sky. This image illustrates a typical agricultural land use scenario, specifically featuring an irrigation infrastructure, relevant to land cover/land use classification in Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) documentation.
